metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5052
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1b,c: transmembrane topology of TMEM230.

Figure 2i: TMEM230 co-localized with synaptic vesicle marker protein synaptophysin (SYP) in (low resolution) confocal microscopy of primary neurons from the mouse midbrain.

Figure 2q: TMEM230 was co-enriched with synaptophysin (SYP) in biochemical fractions of synaptic vesicles isolated from rat brains.

Figure 2r: Immunogold EM of rat brain sections showed TMEM230 was localized to synaptic vesicles in a presynaptic terminal in the CA1 subfield of the hippocampus.

Figure S16: TMEM230 is not exclusively localized to synaptic vesicles;
"TMEM230 did not colocalize with markers for mitochondria, lysosomes or endoplasmic reticulum. ... STX6 colocalized with TMEM230 in perinuclear clusters and in some vesicles, suggesting that the perinuclear structures labeled by TMEM230 correspond to the trans-Golgi network (TGN) and possibly to secretory budding and recycling (secretory/recycling) vesicles.". Experimental description: Result section, Figure 2 legend for EM imaging; "Localization of Tmem230 in the presynaptic vesicle pool region. Immunogold electron microscopy was performed using rat brain sections."

antibody:
"Primary antibodies used in this study included those to TMEM230, also known as C20orf30 (21466-1-AP, Proteintech Group; HPA009078, Sigma-Aldrich; TA504888, Origene)"

antibody for EM specifically:
"For the TMEM230 constructs in the pIRES2-ZsGreen1 system (without a tag), TMEM230 was detected using a monoclonal antibody (TA504888, Origene)."
